sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 39:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 39:1
items.html: The coarseness in a screen is the measure of the yearning in it. Therefore, acquiring and clothing the inner light in a Partzuf intensifies the surrounding light and refines the coarseness in the screen. (Inner Observation, Item 74)
